title: Short Vowel Sounds
subtitle: A, E, I, O, U — Let's Practice!
subject: reading

vocabulary.definition: A small furry animal. Has the short A sound.
A place where you sleep. Has the short E sound.
A farm animal. Has the short I sound.
A wild animal with a bushy tail. Has the short O sound.
A small insect. Has the short U sound.

activities.instruction: Fill in the missing vowel to complete each word.
Circle the word that has a short vowel sound.

parentNotes: Say each word slowly and have your child clap once for every sound they hear. Short vowel words usually follow the consonant-vowel-consonant pattern.
